# loop-improver-mcp insight

## 2026-07-15T00:25:59.123Z - Use one shared repository mission across specialist loops
**Mission:** loop architecture improvement
**Improved:** Reframed objectives.md as one repository-wide mission, outcomes, and evidence model. Existing specialists now preserve their own missions while contributing focused evidence and current insights to that shared mission. Session guidance now selects a concrete mission-serving focus instead of assigning an objective to an agent.
**Prune candidates:** Remove remaining language that frames objectives as agent-owned assignments when discovered in future templates or examples.
**Reusable learnings:** A loop architecture needs a clear ownership boundary: objectives define repo-wide direction; specialists provide lenses, evidence, and feedback. Bump the package version before validating installed behavior when the build tool caches local source artifacts by version.
**Agent self-improvement:** During effectiveness checks, validate generated files, repeat-pass idempotency, and a fresh installed stdio process rather than relying on an already-running editor-hosted MCP server.
